other_observers: Harry Price found the bird. I observed it with him, Peter Gent, Maggie Boswell, David Waltman, Bill Kaempfer, Joanie Kleypas, et al.;
description: Slightly smaller and more delicate than nearby abundant House Finches. Vivid indigo head, red orbital ring around eye. Bill blunt, dark gray. Chartreuse cape. Dark wings with green edges to wing feathers. Bright red underparts & rump. Dark tail.Behaviors: Mostly skulking in dense chokecherry shrubbery. During observation made two trips to seed feeder. Fed for a minute or two on each trip and then returned to shrubbery.Call: not heardPlumage: Adult male
